zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Fleming於1040年出生在英國越可爾斯吉普頓 在 托普可利福時，他的父親Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x39歲，母親Adele de Cambrai36歲。他於1059年之前與Beatrix de Beaumont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1140年在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年101歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Fleming于1040年出生在英国越可爾斯吉普頓 在 托普可利福时，他的父亲Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x39岁，母亲Adele de Cambrai36岁。他于1059年之前与Beatrix de Beaumont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1140年在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年101岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Fleming was born in 1040, in Skipton in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, was 39 and his mother, Adele de Cambrai, was 36. He married Beatrix de Beaumont before 1059. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1140, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 101, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Fleming est né en 1040, à Skipton in Topcliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Adele de Cambrai, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Beaumont avant 1059. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1140, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Fleming 1040 in Skipton in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x 39 und seine Mutter Adele de Cambrai 36. Er hat vor 1059 Beatrix de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1140 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Fleming è nato il nel 1040 nel Skipton in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Cambrai, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Beaumont prima del 1059. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1140, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Flemingが1040年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトン イン トプクリフで生まれた時，父Hughes "de Douai" Fleming xは39歳，母Adele de Cambraiは36歳であった。1059年以前にBeatrix de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1140年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで101歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Fleming(이)가 1040년 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴 인 토pc리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Cambrai(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1059년 이전 Beatrix de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1140년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 101세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Fleming nasceu em 1040, em Skipton in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Cambrai, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Beaumont antes 1059. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 101 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Fleming родился в 1040 г. в местности скиптон ин топклифф, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Cambrai, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Beaumont перед 1059 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1140 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 101 год и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Fleming nació en 1040, en Skipton in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Adele de Cambrai, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Beaumont antes de 1059. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1140, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 101 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
